task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main dashboard or workspace is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Accounts settings in the Administration panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration panel is open, and the 'Accounts' settings page is displayed.
In the Accounts settings, the 'Registration Form' setting is set to 'Public'.

task_completion.description: Restrict the Allowed Domains List to 'rocketchat.local'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Accounts settings, the 'Allowed Domains List' input field contains exactly 'rocketchat.local'.
In the Accounts settings, the toggle or checkbox for 'Allow User Profile Change' is turned off or disabled.
In the Accounts settings, the toggle or checkbox for 'Allow Name Change' is turned off or disabled.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Rocket.Chat GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible with the Rocket.Chat interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat settings page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings are configured within the genuine Rocket.Chat Administration UI, not typed into a text editor or separate document.

integrity.description: The agent saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Save changes' button was clicked, or a success notification is visible indicating the settings were saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Registration Form: 'Public'. Expected Allowed Domains List: 'rocketchat.local'. Expected Allow User Profile Change: false (disabled). Expected Allow Name Change: false (disabled).
